title: Privacy & Consent
description: Control what Kavach is allowed to retain about you, purpose by purpose. Nothing here is retained unless you turn it on.
userIdPlaceholder: The ID you use across Kavach
emptyState: Enter your ID and load to see and control your consent settings.

honeypot_session_retention.label: Honeypot session retention
honeypot_session_retention.description: Keep the transcripts and extracted intelligence from your honeypot sessions.

family_alert_sharing.label: Family alert sharing
family_alert_sharing.description: Share your panic-trigger and call-risk status with your paired protector.

community_heatmap_reporting.label: Community heatmap reporting
community_heatmap_reporting.description: Let your scam reports contribute to the public community heatmap.

case_timeline_storage.label: Case timeline storage
case_timeline_storage.description: Store the case files and events you build in My Scam Case Timeline.
